_description: BooksByMax Designs — Master book catalog. Add new books by appending to the 'books' array. See ADD-A-BOOK.md for the full workflow.

categories.label: Coloring Books
categories.description: Bold, beautiful illustrations designed for little hands — from toddlers taking their first coloring steps to kids who love detailed scenes. Every page is an adventure.

categories.label: Journals
categories.description: Thoughtfully designed guided journals to support prayer, reflection, and spiritual growth. Each journal provides structure and space for meaningful daily practice.

categories.label: Cookbooks & Recipe Books
categories.description: From blank recipe journals to capture family favorites, to fun kids' cookbooks that make cooking an adventure — food and creativity go hand in hand.

books.title: Dinosaur Kids Coloring Book (Ages 1-4)
books.description: Fun dinosaur adventures packed with bold, easy-to-color illustrations designed for young children ages 1–4. Thick outlines and simple shapes make it perfect for little hands just learning to color.

books.title: Dinosaur Toddler Coloring Book
books.description: Simple dinosaur designs with extra-thick outlines and large shapes — perfect for toddlers who are just discovering the joy of coloring. Each page features a single friendly dinosaur ready to be brought to life with color.

books.title: Birds Coloring Book
books.description: Beautiful bird illustrations from around the world — from tropical parrots to majestic eagles. Suitable for all ages, this book is a relaxing and educational coloring experience for bird lovers everywhere.

books.title: Spider Coloring Book For Kids
books.description: Exciting spider-themed coloring pages that spark creativity and imagination in kids of all ages. Features friendly cartoon spiders, webs, and spider habitats in a variety of fun scenes.

books.title: Spider Coloring Book For Toddlers
books.description: Simple, large spider designs with bold outlines perfect for toddler hands. Each friendly spider illustration is easy to color and fun to look at — a great introduction to the amazing world of spiders.

books.title: Cute Pumpkin Toddler Coloring Book
books.description: Adorable pumpkin designs with smiling faces and fun autumn scenes — perfect for toddlers to enjoy during the fall season. Simple shapes and thick outlines make coloring easy and enjoyable for the youngest artists.

books.title: Sermon Notes Journal For Women
books.description: An organized sermon notes journal designed for women who want to capture, reflect on, and apply the messages they hear. Features structured pages with space for scripture references, key points, personal reflections, and action steps.

books.title: Prayer Journal For Women
books.description: A beautifully structured guided prayer journal for daily spiritual reflection, gratitude, and personal growth. Each entry includes prompts for praise, confession, thanksgiving, and supplication — a complete framework for a meaningful prayer life.

books.title: Recipe Book (Write Your Own)
books.description: A blank recipe book to record and preserve your favorite recipes for generations. Features structured pages with space for ingredients, instructions, prep time, serving size, and personal notes. The perfect gift for home cooks.

books.title: Kids Recipe Book / Cookbook
books.description: A fun recipe book designed specifically for kids who love to cook and bake. Features easy-to-follow recipe templates with space for drawings, ingredient lists, and step-by-step instructions — perfect for budding young chefs.
